title: [v5.8] Artifact add optimization on macOS and Windows
body:
This PR adds a new local artifact add API endpoint and enforces absolute path requirements for local file operations.

Fixes: https://issues.redhat.com/browse/RUN-3385
Fixes: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/26321

# Benchmark
- Command: `podman artifact add quay.io/myartifact/benchmark:latest ./artifacts/random-file`
- Artifacts Dir content:
```
$ du -a -h | sort -hr
5G	.
5.0G ./random-file
```

## Benchmark Results: 

### Mac OS
- Number of runs: 10
- Machine: 
   - **Chip**: Apple M3 Pro
   - **RAM**: 36 GB
   - **SSD**: 1 TB Apple SSD 
- Podman machine configuration: 
   - **CPUs**: 8
   - **Memory**: 8.1 GB
- [report](https://gcsweb-ci.apps.ci.l2s4.p1.openshiftapps.com/gcs/test-platform-results/pr-logs/pull/openshift-psap_topsail/856/pull-ci-openshift-psap-topsail-main-cont_bench-jump-ci/1986356418457899008/artifacts/jump-ci/005-test/artifacts/test-artifacts/001__plots/report_01_report:_benchmark_comparison_report.html)

#### Providers
##### applehv
- Before: 32.82 s
- After: **5.77 s**

##### libkrun (krunkit 0.2.1)
- Before: 25.87 s
- After: **7.17 s**

### Windows
- Windows 10
- Number of runs: 10
- Machine: 
   - **CPU**: Intel Core i7-8665U
   - **RAM**: 32 GB
   - **SSD**: 500 GB Samsung 970 Evo Plus
- Podman machine configuration: 
   - **CPUs**: 8
   - **Memory**: 2 GB (WSL) | 8.2 GB (Hyper-v)
- [report](https://gcsweb-ci.apps.ci.l2s4.p1.openshiftapps.com/gcs/test-platform-results/pr-logs/pull/openshift-psap_topsail/856/pull-ci-openshift-psap-topsail-main-cont_bench-jump-ci/1985639683794669568/artifacts/jump-ci/005-test/artifacts/test-artifacts/001__plots/report_01_report:_benchmark_comparison_report.html)

#### Providers
##### WSL
- **Memory**: 2 GB
- Before: **35.25 s**
- After: 78.31 s

##### Hyper-V 
- **Memory**: 8.2 GB
- Before: 362.70 s
- After: **51.66 s**

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

<!--
Write `None` if there are no user-facing changes, otherwise enter your release note below.
Include "action required" if users need to take action when upgrading.

```release-note
Added new local artifact add API endpoint (`libpod/local/artifacts/add`) for loading artifacts from local files
Image and artifact load endpoints now require absolute paths for local file operations to improve security and prevent path ambiguity
```
